name: Performapal Sky Magician
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スカイ・マジシャン
desc: Once per turn, if you activate a Spell Card: This card gains 300 ATK. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Continuous Spell you control; return it to the hand, then you can activate 1 "Magician" Continuous Spell from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Sky Magician" once per turn. If this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if you activate a Spell Card: This card gains 300 ATK. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Continuous Spell you control; return it to the hand, then you can activate 1 "Magician" Continuous Spell from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Sky Magician" once per turn. If this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
eff: Once per turn, if you activate a Spell Card: This card gains 300 ATK. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Continuous Spell you control; return it to the hand, then you can activate 1 "Magician" Continuous Spell from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Sky Magician" once per turn. If this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
mst: Allows activation of Spell Cards from the player's hand during the opponent's turn
